title: 4 Pack Qtip Holder Dispenser with Bamboo Lids - 10 oz Clear Plastic Apothecary Jar Containers for Vanity Makeup Organizer Storage - Bathroom Accessories Set for Cotton Swab, Ball, Pads, Floss
description:
About this item
PRODUCT INCLUDE: Item includes 4 pack 10 Oz q tip apothecary jar with bamboo lids [ Diameter - 2.7 inches, Height - 4.5 inches ], 6 white labels, 6 transparent label with black words (Cotton Balls, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Pads, Hair Ties, Floss Picks, Bath Salt). Uniquely designed labels are commonly used by most people. You can also DIY your writing on the white labels
ATTRACTIVE AND DURABLE: The jar is made of food-grade plastic, BPA-Free, thick clear plastic looks like glass or acrylic, but it is more drop-resistant than glass. The lid is made of 100% natural bamboo and the handle is designed with round beads, which is a combination of hand feeling and aesthetic feeling. While being practical, it also makes the jar more beautiful
BATHROOM ACCESSORIES OF IDEAL SIZE: It can perfectly store some small items, keep them neat & clean. As excellent organization canisters, you can easily open with one hand. You can use these storage containers for organizing small items, such as beauty egg, face brush, candy, pens, clip, cotton balls, cotton swabs, cotton pads, hair ties, floss picks, bath salt and more
ELEGANT HOME DECORATION: Functional yet decorative, exquisite and transparent jar with bamboo cover is a very natural decorative element, which is suitable for many scenes, such as bathroom decor, restroom decor, bedroom, kitchen, office or process room, in some narrow spaces, such as wall shelves and small bathroom dressers
100% SATISFACTION CUSTOMER SERVICE: If the product you received was damaged or imperfect or you are not 100% satisfied, please contact us directly, we will provide a satisfactory solution for you
reviews_5s:
4 Pack Qtip Holder Dispenser with Bamboo Lids: A Stylish and Functional Bathroom Organizer (with a Minor Caveat)

This set of 4 Qtip holder dispensers with bamboo lids offers a stylish and practical solution for bathroom storage. Here's a breakdown of its pros and cons to help you decide if it's the right choice for you:

Pros:

Multiple Uses: These containers can hold various bathroom essentials, including cotton swabs, cotton balls, cotton pads, dental floss, and other small items.
Clear Design: The clear plastic allows you to easily see the contents, making it convenient to grab what you need without opening the lid.
Bamboo Lids: The bamboo lids add a natural and elegant touch to your bathroom decor, complementing various design styles.
Decent Size: The 10oz capacity is sufficient to hold a good amount of cotton swabs or other small items, reducing the need for frequent refilling.
Cons:

Limited User Reviews: While the product description and information readily available online seem promising, there are currently limited reviews from actual users to gauge its long-term durability and functionality.
Overall:

Based on the features and design, the 4 Pack Qtip Holder Dispenser with Bamboo Lids appears to be a stylish and functional choice for organizing bathroom essentials. The clear design, multiple uses, and bamboo lids offer a combination of practicality and aesthetics. However, the limited availability of user reviews might be a point to consider, especially if you prefer to rely on user feedback before making a purchase.

Here are some additional points to keep in mind:

The size (10oz) might not be suitable for everyone, especially if you have a large family or use a lot of cotton products.
The material (plastic) might not be as durable as glass or ceramic containers.
If you are looking for a stylish and practical way to organize your bathroom essentials, and the limitations mentioned above don't concern you, this set of Qtip holders could be a good option. However, if you prioritize user reviews, long-term durability, or a larger size, you might want to explore other options.These are perfect! They hold a good amount of stuff inside they look great to have out on display or you can hide them in a cabinet too!I was impressed with how durable these are for the price. They are easy to clean. Very thick, perfect for organizing. The lid is beautiful!Smaller than i thought but it still worked perfect and looks really clean instead of having the q-tips it the box:/I bought these for my new motorhome to put on the counter. They come with labels which I like and they look really nice. I put some velcro on the counter so they would stay in place and it works perfectly when I need them. Lids stay in place even on uneven roads that we encounter.They are durable and fit well on my sink..they are easy to use and at a good price. They are perfect to help organize your bathroom and this are thick.They are as described. Perfect for all the bathroom goods (q tips, cotton balls, dental floss ...) looks durable, I have not dropped it to test it, but it looks like it will not break. The lids are loose, so if you do drop it, all the contents will go everywhere. Not meant to be a cary-on item, also not good for travel, but a good looking organizer for around the house.Perfect size for my bathroom I love the look of them super cute!These little bathroom jars are the perfect blend of cute and functional. 🫣✨ They’re just the right size for holding cotton balls, Q-tips, or whatever little essentials you need without taking up too much space. Plus, they add that tiny bit of elevated aesthetic to the bathroom, like I’ve got my life together (even if I’m still using the shower floor as a laundry basket). 😂

They’re cute, practical, and honestly, a perfect way to show off my organizational “skills.” 💅Love these. Comes with labels and fits my hair ties, flossers, and q rips perfect.
reviews_1s: Not just low quality, as you would expect from low prices. I mean low quality control. The lid handles are affixed by drilling a hole from the bottom of the lid - every single one isn’t centered. The edges are a little rough as it’s just straight cut, so don’t run your finger along the edge of the lid. The varnish is thinly applied and seems like it would wash off fairly soon over time. One lid had an obvious defect so I’m not inclined to use it where guests might see it. The plastic is clear with decent heft. It isn’t thick but it doesn’t feel flimsy. The stickers are a nice touch but I don’t care to use them when it’s obvious what’s inside. There are so many similar sellers to choose from; I assume they all have their defects at this price point so I’m keeping them and to avoid the environmental waste of a return. Working on learning to accept “good enough.”2 of the containers cracked one totally crushedIt’s not worth the price. Look very cheap. Look like something you can purchase from the dollar store. Save your money. It’s not worth itThe tops don't stay on at all. Fall of very easy. Ibwoild return but don't want the hassle.Not as shown in product picture . Should be half the price shown . Not worth it . Better quality at Walmart or family dollarGraciasReturned.Definitely not worth the price. Lightweight, smaller than expected. Probably could have found something more suitable at the dollar store.These containers are incredibly small, there is absolutely no the way they are 4 inches as described. Also, they are plastic, and they don’t seem to be high-quality plastic either. They just seem so cheap. Honestly I wouldn’t recommend these to anybody. I’m going to replace them as soon as possible. These are embarrassing to have in my guest bathroom.
